title: Forsaken Mod
description: This is a mod about the roblox game forsaken that adds most characters and is currently a work in progress
body:
info log 19-10-2025

discontinued





   


Forsaken is a roblox game and i tried to make it a minecraft mod.
This mods adds almost all the killers that are
1. **coolkidd**
2. **Slasher**
3. **john doe**
4. **noli**

the killer 1x1x1x1 is currently in progress 

all the killers have unique abilities 

such has not letting you attack (Slasher)

summoning minions (coolkidd)

being very durable (john doe)

and throwing his item (WIP noli WIP)

once killed every killer will drop an **special item**

this mod will not update much once i release 1x1x1x1 i wont continue updating it 

. Mob drops:
1. Slasher: he will drop his machete once finished for now he only punches
2. c00lkidd: he drops his firebrand sword that sets enemies on fire
3. john doe: he will drop his spike arm dealing giant damage but being very heavy
4. noli:he will drop his void star that can be trown and used for crafting the void star helmet
